nodes.title: First Clip Positive Prompt
widgets_values: A soft-lit medium close-up frames a young woman speaking directly into the camera in a warm modern apartment, ambient golden light from a table lamp glowing behind her as she shifts her weight and gestures with one hand, her expression open and animated. "So I've been thinking about this all week and I finally figured out what was bothering me — it wasn't what you said, it was the way you said it, like you already knew what I was going to choose before I even opened my mouth, and honestly that's the part that stung because somehow, some way, you were right." The room hums with the low warmth of a lo-fi piano and soft pad melody.

nodes.title: Loop Iterate Prompt - Line break only, No New Lines!
widgets_values:
A soft-lit medium close-up frames a young woman speaking directly into the camera in a warm modern apartment, ambient golden light from a table lamp glowing behind her as she tilts her head and tucks a strand of hair behind her ear, her brow furrowing slightly. "And the worst part is I can't even be mad about it because every time I try to build a case in my head I just end up arguing myself out of it — like my brain is my own opposing counsel and she is winning, like objectively destroying me in there." The room hums with the low warmth of a lo-fi piano and soft pad melody.
A soft-lit medium close-up frames a young woman speaking directly into the camera in a warm modern apartment, ambient golden light from a table lamp glowing behind her as she leans forward slightly with both hands pressed together, eyes widening for emphasis. "So I called my sister about it and she just goes 'yeah that sounds like a you problem' and hangs up — like literally hangs up, no goodbye, no follow-up, just silence and then the little beep, and I sat there holding my phone like an idiot for a full ten seconds waiting for her to come back." The room hums with the low warmth of a lo-fi piano and soft pad melody.
A soft-lit medium close-up frames a young woman speaking directly into the camera in a warm modern apartment, ambient golden light from a table lamp glowing behind her as she exhales slowly and drops her shoulders, a reluctant smile breaking through. "But honestly I think I needed to hear it that way because now I'm just like — fine, okay, I'll deal with it, I'll be the bigger person or whatever, but I'm keeping score and one day I'm cashing all of this in and it's going to be spectacular, just so everyone knows." The room hums with the low warmth of a lo-fi piano and soft pad melody .
A soft-lit medium close-up frames a young woman speaking directly into the camera in a warm modern apartment, ambient golden light from a table lamp glowing behind her as she rolls her eyes and waves a hand dismissively, her lips pressing together before she speaks. "Because here's the thing nobody tells you about being the bigger person — it's boring, it's so deeply boring, you just sit there being mature while everyone else gets to be chaotic and messy and interesting, and meanwhile I'm over here choosing peace like some kind of emotional hall monitor." The room hums with the low warmth of a lo-fi piano and soft pad melody.
A soft-lit medium close-up frames a young woman speaking directly into the camera in a warm modern apartment, ambient golden light from a table lamp glowing behind her as she crosses her arms loosely and raises one eyebrow, a smirk tugging at the corner of her mouth. "And you know what really got me is she texted back like two hours later just the word 'anyway' with a period — not even a question, not even a follow-up, just 'anyway' like she was closing a chapter in a book she didn't even enjoy reading, and I have to just live with that apparently." The room hums with the low warmth of a lo-fi piano and soft pad melody.
A soft-lit medium close-up frames a young woman speaking directly into the camera in a warm modern apartment, ambient golden light from a table lamp glowing behind her as she drops her chin into one hand and stares into the lens with tired amusement, shaking her head slowly. "So yeah that's where I'm at — I'm not mad, I'm not sad, I'm just standing in the middle of the emotional airport watching everyone else's baggage go around the carousel while mine apparently got sent to a different city, and I didn't even pack that much." The room hums with the low warmth of a lo-fi piano and soft pad melody drifting underneath, mixed with the faint ambient hiss of an air conditioner.

nodes.title: FADE: Negative Prompt
widgets_values: watermark, text, logo, blurry, low resolution, deformed hands, extra fingers, distorted face, bad anatomy, oversaturated, washed out, grainy, pixelated, extra teeth, deformed teeth, subtitles, overlays

inputs.text: video of a woman passionately singing alone

still image with no motion, subtitles, text, scene change, instruments, violin, blurry, out of focus, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, flickering, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field
